[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11011000 4
2 00100111 4
3 00110111 5
4 11011110 6
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 00011011 4
